title: Physical home and artifact shape for synaplex.ai knowledge system
summary: ADR-0027 names the knowledge system as a load-bearing layer of synaplex.ai — the accumulating body of validated invariants that persists across pod lifecycles, with provenance back to pod evidence and forward pointers to consuming pods/reviews. Physical home is deliberately left open by ADR-0027. Candidates: (a) new artifact type inside projects/context-repository/ (formal, spec-adjacent), (b) top-level directory inside projects/synaplex/ (operational, project-adjacent), (c) hybrid — context-repository hosts formal invariant definitions, synaplex hosts editorially-projected versions + cross-references + review methodologies. Artifact shape likely extends the canon type system (new Invariant type, or projection onto Policy). Requires context-repository adversarial review before any canon spec bump.
evidence: ADR-0027 §Open design questions explicitly defers the physical-home decision pending a design pass.
Principal articulation (2026-04-19) names 'synaplex.ai's knowledge system' as a durable layer distinct from canon (formal methodology) and publication (communication).
disturbs: canon v0.1.0 (frozen) — adding a new type requires a spec bump to v0.2.0+ through the context-repository adversarial-review path
next_step: Design pass examining the three candidate homes against (a) self-learning feedback loop requirements, (b) pod-graduation persistence, (c) pedagogical projection suitability, (d) strange-loop self-reference (knowledge system contains claims about itself). Produce a short design note + target ADR within two weeks. Do not bump canon spec until the design pass converges; block on context-repository adversarial review before any spec change.
disposition_rationale: Deferred from ADR-0027 because the architecture commit does not require this decision. First lab evaluation (memory-systems-v1) can execute and emit canon envelopes under the existing spec; invariants extracted from it can be stored initially inside projects/synaplex/lab/.canon/ and migrated once the design pass completes. Premature commitment to one of the candidates would anchor on the wrong abstraction; creative-pragmatism discipline per ADR-0027 prefers ship-then-shape over over-design.
